(Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received high-concentration oxygen therapy in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
972 SCTNG_ADMSN_CD SCTNG_ADMSN_CD O0110D1A Therapies: Suctioning (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received suctioning days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
973 SCTNG_14_CD SCTNG_14_CD O0110D1B
